breaches.title: Council of Europe investigates ShinyHunters data breach claims
breaches.tldr: The Council of Europe, the continent's oldest intergovernmental body, is probing claims of a data breach made by the ShinyHunters extortion group over the weekend. [...]
breaches.action: Verify system logs for indicators of compromise and apply relevant patches.

breaches.title: Chinese hackers breach REDCap servers, steal medical research
breaches.tldr: A China-linked espionage campaign targeted exposed REDCap servers to deploy the InfiniteRed malware and steal sensitive data from a medical institution in North America. [...]
breaches.action: Verify system logs for indicators of compromise and apply relevant patches.

breaches.title: Infinite Campus data breach affects 137,000 school staff accounts
breaches.tldr: The ShinyHunters extortion gang stole personal information from more than 137,000 school staff accounts in a Salesforce data theft attack that targeted the widely used Infinite Campus K-12 student information system in March. [...]
breaches.action: Verify system logs for indicators of compromise and apply relevant patches.

vulns.title: Cisco fixes SD-WAN vManage flaw exploited in zero-day attacks
